name: Kolache Fillings
recipeInstructions:
1. Poppy Seed Filling: Grind 1 1/2 cups poppyseed. Add 1 cup sugar and about 2 cups water or milk. Cook until it begins to thicken. Stir in 2 tablespoons butter or margarine, then add the flour mixture. Cook, stirring constantly, until done. Cool.
2. Cheese Filling: Mix cottage cheese with a streusel of 1/2 cup flour, 1/2 cup sugar, and 1/2 cup butter or margarine. Add 1 egg and 1 teaspoon vanilla. Optionally add 1 cup coconut and raisins. Some streusel can be added on top.
3. Apricot Filling: Cook dried apricots in a small amount of water slowly. Add drained peach slices when soft, mash together, add sugar to taste and butter or margarine. Tapioca may be added as a thickener. Let set for a day or so before using.
4. Prune Filling: Mash cooked prunes. Mix with sugar, cinnamon, and melted butter.
